# Gradle Wrapper

Run `gradle wrapper` from a machine with Gradle installed to generate the wrapper jar.
Or download from: https://services.gradle.org/distributions/gradle-8.8-bin.zip

For first-time setup:
```bash
# If you have gradle installed:
gradle wrapper --gradle-version 8.8

# Or use SDKMAN:
sdk install gradle 8.8
gradle wrapper
```
